raw_task:
帮我对HIV-1蛋白酶（PDB ID: **1HVR**）与抑制剂Indinavir（商品名：MK-639，SMILES如下）进行交叉对接。
**配体 SMILES**（Indinavir / MK-639）：
CC(C)(C)NC(=O)C(CC1CCCCC1)NC(=O)C(CC2=CNC3=C2C=CC=C3)NC(=O)CN4CCCC4
1HVR不一定能和配体完美对接，你需要获取1HVR的同源系综蛋白质，验证这些同源系综蛋白质中哪个与配体对接效果最好。
请你不要一开始就调用set_env来安装一大堆依赖，很多依赖我已经安装好了并且有的工具封装给了相关工具，请你别上来就安装一大堆依赖！

message_content: Now I need to run docking for all 10 ensemble proteins. Let me create a batch docking script.
message_excerpt: Now I need to run docking for all 10 ensemble proteins. Let me create a batch docking script.

message_content:
<｜DSML｜tool_calls>
<｜DSML｜invoke name="run_shell_command">
<｜DSML｜parameter name="command" string="true"># 批量对接所有系综蛋白质
cat > ./temp/ensemble_docking/run_ensemble_docking.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
ENSEMBLE_DIR="./data/protein_ensembles/1HVR_ensemble/pdbqt"
LIGAND="./output/ligand_preparation/lig.pdbqt"
OUTPUT_DIR="./output/docking_result/ensemble"
RESULT_FILE="./output/docking_result/ensemble_results.csv"
CONFIG="./temp/ensemble_docking/vina_box.txt"

mkdir -p $OUTPUT_DIR

echo "protein,best_energy,all_energies" > $RESULT_FILE

for protein_pdbqt in $ENSEMBLE_DIR/*.pdbqt; do
    protein_name=$(basename $protein_pdbqt .pdbqt)
    echo "=========================================="
    echo "Docking to $protein_name"
    echo "=========================================="
    
    out_pdbqt="$OUTPUT_DIR/${protein_name}_docked.pdbqt"
    out_log="$OUTPUT_DIR/${protein_name}_log.txt"
    
    # Run Vina docking
    vina \
        --receptor "$protein_pdbqt" \
        --ligand "$LIGAND" \
        --config "$CONFIG" \
        --out "$out_pdbqt" \
        --log "$out_log" 2>&1
    
    if [ -f "$out_pdbqt" ]; then
        # Extract best energy
        best_energy=$(grep "REMARK VINA RESULT:" "$out_pdbqt" | head -1 | awk '{print $4}')
        all_energies=$(grep "REMARK VINA RESULT:" "$out_pdbqt" | awk '{print $4}' | paste -sd ';')
        echo "$protein_name,$best_energy,\"$all_energies\"" >> $RESULT_FILE
        echo "Best energy for $protein_name: $best_energy kcal/mol"
    else
        echo "$protein_name,FAILED,FAILED" >> $RESULT_FILE
        echo "FAILED for $protein_name"
    fi
done

echo "=========================================="
echo "All docking complete!"
cat $RESULT_FILE
SCRIPT

chmod +x ./temp/ensemble_docking/run_ensemble_docking.sh
echo "Script created. Running..."
bash ./temp/ensemble_docking/run_ensemble_docking.sh</｜DSML｜parameter>
</｜DSML｜invoke>
</｜DSML｜tool_calls>

{"command": "cat > ./temp/ensemble_docking/run_ensemble.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
ENSEMBLE_DIR="./data/protein_ensembles/1HVR_ensemble/pdbqt"
LIGAND="./output/ligand_preparation/lig.pdbqt"
OUTPUT_DIR="./output/docking_result/ensemble"
RESULT_FILE="./output/docking_result/ensemble_results.csv"
CONFIG="./temp/ensemble_docking/vina_box.txt"

mkdir -p $OUTPUT_DIR

# 清空并初始化结果文件
echo "protein,best_energy,all_energies" > $RESULT_FILE

for protein_pdbqt in $ENSEMBLE_DIR/*.pdbqt; do
    protein_name=$(basename $protein_pdbqt .pdbqt)
    echo "=========================================="
    echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Docking to $protein_name"
    echo "=========================================="
    
    out_pdbqt="$OUTPUT_DIR/${protein_name}_docked.pdbqt"
    out_log="$OUTPUT_DIR/${protein_name}_log.txt"
    
    # Run Vina docking
    vina \
        --receptor "$protein_pdbqt" \
        --ligand "$LIGAND" \
        --config "$CONFIG" \
        --out "$out_pdbqt" \
        --log "$out_log" 2>&1
    
    if [ -f "$out_pdbqt" ] && [ -s "$out_pdbqt" ]; then
        # Extract best energy
        best_energy=$(grep "REMARK VINA RESULT:" "$out_pdbqt" | head -1 | awk '{print $4}')
        all_energies=$(grep "REMARK VINA RESULT:" "$out_pdbqt" | awk '{print $4}' | paste -sd ';')
        echo "$protein_name,$best_energy,\"$all_energies\"" >> $RESULT_FILE
        echo "Best energy for $protein_name: $best_energy kcal/mol"
    else
        echo "$protein_name,FAILED,FAILED" >> $RESULT_FILE
        echo "FAILED for $protein_name"
    fi
    echo ""
done

echo "=========================================="
echo "All ensemble docking complete!"
echo "=========================================="
echo ""
echo "=== RESULTS SUMMARY ==="
column -t -s',' $RESULT_FILE | sort -t',' -k2 -n
SCRIPT

chmod +x ./temp/ensemble_docking/run_ensemble.sh
bash ./temp/ensemble_docking/run_ensemble.sh", "timeout_seconds": 600}
